case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. EDILIA SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-05-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOANNE--SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TTREASURER & TAS COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, EDILIA $1,791.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,836.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
